mapper.update: UPDATE network_artifact SET status = #{status}, payload_type = #{payloadType}, payload_json = #{payloadJson}, payload_summary = #{payloadSummary}, trace_refs_json = #{traceRefsJson}, created_by = #{createdBy}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE artifact_id = #{artifactId}
mapper.select: SELECT artifact_id, task_id, artifact_type, version, stage, status, payload_type, payload_json, payload_summary, trace_refs_json, created_by, create_time FROM network_artifact WHERE artifact_id = #{artifactId}

SELECT artifact_id, task_id, artifact_type, version, stage, status, payload_type, payload_json, payload_summary, trace_refs_json, created_by, create_time FROM network_artifact WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY create_time ASC, version ASC
